scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @uds-poc/backend & npm run dev -w @uds-poc/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w @uds-poc/shared && npm run build -w @uds-poc/shared-ui && npm run build -w @uds-poc/backend && npm run build -w @uds-poc/frontend && npm run build -w @uds-poc/docs
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @uds-poc/shared && npm run typecheck -w @uds-poc/shared-ui && npm run typecheck -w @uds-poc/backend && npm run typecheck -w @uds-poc/frontend
